title: Teladoc acquires Australian virtual care firm Telecare for international expansion
text: Teladoc Health acquires Australian virtual care provider Telecare as part of international expansion strategy. Acquisition Details: Telecare supports Teladoc's enterprise strategy to expand international business. Company operated in Australia for 15 years, offering virtual care through insurers and hospitals. Recently deployed virtual neonatology and virtual telesurgery support systems in country. International Expansion Strategy: International revenue increased 10% to $112.2 million in Q2, now accounting for 15%+ of consolidated revenue. Teladoc serves 90+ million people, active in 130 countries. CEO targets international expansion for BetterHelp in non-English-speaking markets plus UK, Canada and Australia. One Teladoc Strategy: Transforming patient experience and streamlining global operations. Consolidating multiple ERPs and CRMs in 20 countries into one global solution. Provides 24x7 international services in Europe, South America and Asia, operates in 175+ countries through organic growth, localized clinical networks and partnerships.
